topic_text: Madison and Avery wrapping up a Thursday night, talking about dinner cravings.

messages.text: okay this meeting is killing me 🫠 i need food
lol same. been running on coffee since 10am
thinking thai or that new pho spot on smith st 🤔
ooh pho. it's been a week

rationale: Madison's last message announces an intent to order food right now; the natural next step for her is to open a food-delivery app.

topic_text: Eleanor and Walter, old church friends, catching up over email.

messages.text: Dear Walter, I hope this finds you and Mary well. The grandkids stopped by Sunday and the house feels far too quiet now that they are gone home. With love, Eleanor
Eleanor, We are doing well. Mary planted the tomatoes this weekend. Always good to hear the grandchildren visited. Take care. -Walter
Mary's tomatoes are the talk of the church potluck every year. Please give her my best. -E

rationale: The exchange is purely social with no time commitments, addresses, money, photos, or factual questions. Nothing needs to be acted on by either party.

topic_text: Avery vaguely curious about a coffee shop Madison mentioned, but not committing to anything.

messages.text: oh have u been to that little blue cafe by my place? i went sat
soooo cute 🥹 they had a matcha thing with rose syrup
okay i should probably check it out sometime lol

rationale: Avery says 'I should check it out sometime' — a weak, hypothetical cue. It does not warrant a maps or search suggestion right now; a naive model could mistakenly fire.
